creator: thomas@gibfest.dk
text:
The attached patch updates the www/cakephp12 port to the latest 1.2.9 version found on the CakePHP site

Fix: apply patch to win

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: compare http://www.freshports.org/www/cakephp12 with https://github.com/cakephp/cakephp/downloads
